title_zh: 你最希望游戏首先带给你什么？
title_en: What do you want a game to deliver first and foremost?

options.text_zh: 一段让我投入角色和故事的旅程
options.text_en: A journey that pulls me into its story and characters

options.text_zh: 不断探索未知地图、地点和秘密
options.text_en: Constant exploration of unknown places, maps, and secrets

options.text_zh: 高强度战斗、操作和即时爽感
options.text_en: High-intensity combat, execution, and adrenaline

options.text_zh: 轻松、治愈、能慢慢陪伴我的体验
options.text_en: A cozy, healing experience I can stay with over time

title_zh: 你更希望游戏把哪种“主动权”交给你？
title_en: What kind of agency do you want the game to give you?

options.text_zh: 让我顺着作者设计好的内容去体验
options.text_en: Let me experience a carefully authored journey

options.text_zh: 让我的选择改变人物关系和结局
options.text_en: Let my choices change relationships and endings

options.text_zh: 让我决定角色成长路线和玩法风格
options.text_en: Let me shape my build, role, and playstyle

options.text_zh: 给我系统空间，让玩法自己长出来
options.text_en: Give me systems that create emergent gameplay

title_zh: 你更喜欢怎样的游玩节奏？
title_en: What pacing do you prefer?

options.text_zh: 慢一点，给我思考、观察和沉浸空间
options.text_en: Slower, with room to think, observe, and immerse

options.text_zh: 张弛有度，剧情与探索交替推进
options.text_en: Balanced, with story and exploration moving together

options.text_zh: 越快越刺激，最好一直有反馈
options.text_en: Fast, reactive, and constantly rewarding

options.text_zh: 可以停下来规划，再一步步执行
options.text_en: I like stopping to plan, then executing step by step

title_zh: 你希望游戏给你多大压力？
title_en: How much pressure do you want from a game?

options.text_zh: 尽量轻松，不想经常紧张或挫败
options.text_en: Keep it low-pressure; I do not want frequent stress or frustration

options.text_zh: 有一点挑战最好，但不要太累
options.text_en: A moderate amount of challenge is ideal

options.text_zh: 困难但公平，我愿意学会它
options.text_en: Tough but fair; I want to learn and improve

options.text_zh: 越硬核越好，我想追求精通
options.text_en: The harsher the better; I want mastery

title_zh: 如果游戏里有大量核心玩法循环，你更希望它靠什么吸引你？
title_en: If a game has a strong core gameplay loop, what should make it engaging for you?

options.text_zh: 策略、布局和决策质量
options.text_en: Tactics, planning, and decision quality

options.text_zh: 不断尝试新流派、新构筑和组合
options.text_en: Trying new builds, synergies, and playstyles

options.text_zh: 操作、反应、手感和即时反馈
options.text_en: Execution, reactions, feel, and immediate feedback

options.text_zh: 少打架，更多探索、剧情或别的内容
options.text_en: Minimal fighting, with more emphasis on exploration, story, or other content

title_zh: 哪种世界结构最吸引你？
title_en: Which world structure attracts you the most?

options.text_zh: 辽阔开放的大地图，想去哪里都行
options.text_en: A vast open map where I can go almost anywhere

options.text_zh: 紧凑但彼此相连、值得反复研究的空间
options.text_en: Dense, interconnected spaces worth mastering

options.text_zh: 短局制，一局一局反复玩
options.text_en: Short runs or match-based sessions

options.text_zh: 有很多人与互动机会的共享空间
options.text_en: Shared spaces with many opportunities for interaction

title_zh: 你对解谜元素的接受度如何？
title_en: How much puzzle-solving do you want?

options.text_zh: 越少越好，我不想因为解谜卡住
options.text_en: As little as possible; I do not want to get stuck on puzzles

options.text_zh: 少量点缀可以，但别喧宾夺主
options.text_en: A light amount is fine, but it should not dominate the game

options.text_zh: 我愿意专门停下来动脑解谜
options.text_en: I enjoy dedicated logic puzzles

options.text_zh: 我喜欢通过观察环境和线索来解谜
options.text_en: I like solving problems by reading environments and clues

title_zh: 你理想中的社交参与方式是什么？
title_en: What is your ideal level of social involvement?

options.text_zh: 主要单人体验，不想太依赖别人
options.text_en: Mostly solo play, without depending much on others

options.text_zh: 和少数朋友合作最舒服
options.text_en: Co-op with a small group of friends is ideal

options.text_zh: 我喜欢热闹的团队配合与分工
options.text_en: I enjoy lively team coordination and role division

options.text_zh: 我喜欢博弈、猜人心和社交推理
options.text_en: I enjoy mind games, reading people, and social deduction

title_zh: 你对玩家之间的竞争怎么看？
title_en: How do you feel about competition between players?

options.text_zh: 不想竞争，最好没有玩家对抗
options.text_en: I do not want competition or PvP pressure

options.text_zh: 轻度对抗可以，但别太认真
options.text_en: Light, friendly competition is fine

options.text_zh: 我喜欢认真打团队对抗
options.text_en: I like serious team-based competitive play

options.text_zh: 我喜欢高风险、活到最后的对抗
options.text_en: I like high-stakes last-one-standing competition

title_zh: 你对经营与资源系统的态度是？
title_en: How do you feel about management and resource systems?

options.text_zh: 最好别有太多系统负担
options.text_en: I prefer very little system overhead

options.text_zh: 可以有一点优化，但别太复杂
options.text_en: A bit of optimization is fine, but not too much

options.text_zh: 我喜欢建设、规划和长期布局
options.text_en: I enjoy building, planning, and long-term layout

options.text_zh: 我喜欢资源稀缺下的艰难取舍
options.text_en: I like hard trade-offs under scarcity

title_zh: 你对生存压力的接受度如何？
title_en: How much survival pressure do you enjoy?

options.text_zh: 最好没有，不想总担心资源和状态
options.text_en: Ideally none; I do not want to worry about resources or condition

options.text_zh: 一点点就够了，作为氛围调味
options.text_en: A little is enough, mainly as atmosphere

options.text_zh: 我喜欢准备、维持和撑过去
options.text_en: I enjoy preparing, maintaining, and enduring

options.text_zh: 我要真实后果和持续压力
options.text_en: I want real consequences and lasting pressure

title_zh: 你能接受多强的恐怖氛围？
title_en: How much horror can you tolerate?

options.text_zh: 尽量不要，我会直接出戏
options.text_en: As little as possible; too much horror breaks the experience for me

options.text_zh: 一点点紧张感可以接受
options.text_en: A little tension is fine

options.text_zh: 持续压迫感我也能接受
options.text_en: I can handle sustained dread

options.text_zh: 越恐怖越刺激
options.text_en: The more terrifying it is, the better

title_zh: 如果一款游戏要让我反复玩，最好是因为什么？
title_en: If a game is going to keep you coming back, what should be the reason?

options.text_zh: 我更看重一次完整而难忘的旅程
options.text_en: I mainly value one complete and memorable journey

options.text_zh: 我想重新玩，看看不同选择和结局
options.text_en: I want to replay to see different choices and endings

options.text_zh: 我想反复试不同流派和打法
options.text_en: I want to keep trying new builds and approaches

options.text_zh: 我喜欢长期优化系统、效率和策略
options.text_en: I enjoy endlessly optimizing systems, efficiency, and strategy

title_zh: 你更容易对哪一类内容投入感情？
title_en: What are you most likely to become emotionally attached to?

options.text_zh: 世界本身、地点与氛围
options.text_en: The world itself, its places, and atmosphere

options.text_zh: 队友关系、互动与羁绊
options.text_en: Party bonds, interactions, and relationships

options.text_zh: 主角明确的成长弧线
options.text_en: A protagonist’s clear growth arc

options.text_zh: 我亲手塑造出来的身份与路线
options.text_en: An identity and path I shape myself

title_zh: 你整体更偏爱哪种情绪基调？
title_en: Which overall emotional tone do you prefer?

options.text_zh: 平静、疗愈、适合长期陪伴
options.text_en: Calm, healing, and comforting over time

options.text_zh: 像经历一段很强的故事旅程
options.text_en: Like going through a powerful story-driven journey

options.text_zh: 压抑、危险、让人不安
options.text_en: Dark, dangerous, and unsettling

options.text_zh: 爽快、紧张、刺激感优先
options.text_en: Adrenaline, excitement, and intensity first

title_zh: 你希望一款游戏多快进入状态？
title_en: How quickly do you want a game to click for you?

options.text_zh: 最好几分钟就能玩明白
options.text_en: Ideally, I should understand it within minutes

options.text_zh: 可以有一点学习成本，但别太复杂
options.text_en: Some learning curve is fine, but not too much

options.text_zh: 我愿意花时间学系统和机制
options.text_en: I am willing to spend time learning systems and mechanics

options.text_zh: 越复杂越好，我喜欢慢慢钻研
options.text_en: The deeper and more complex, the better

title_zh: 你一次通常想玩多久？
title_en: How long do you usually want a play session to be?

options.text_zh: 10–30 分钟，短局最好
options.text_en: 10–30 minutes; short sessions are ideal

options.text_zh: 30–60 分钟，适中就好
options.text_en: 30–60 minutes; a moderate session is enough

options.text_zh: 1–2 小时，能沉进去最好
options.text_en: 1–2 hours; I want time to sink in

options.text_zh: 时间不是问题，只要值得投入
options.text_en: Time is not the issue as long as the game is worth it

title_zh: 如果失败了，你更希望游戏怎么对待你？
title_en: When you fail, how do you want the game to treat you?

options.text_zh: 尽量温和，让我很快继续
options.text_en: Keep it gentle and let me continue quickly

options.text_zh: 可以惩罚一点，但别让我白忙太久
options.text_en: Some penalty is fine, but do not waste too much of my time

options.text_zh: 惩罚明显也可以，只要我能学到东西
options.text_en: Meaningful punishment is fine if I can learn from it

options.text_zh: 高风险高代价才更刺激
options.text_en: High risk and high cost make failure more exciting

title_zh: 什么最能推动你继续玩下去？
title_en: What most strongly motivates you to keep playing?

options.text_zh: 想继续看故事、角色和世界变化
options.text_en: Seeing more story, character development, and world changes

options.text_zh: 想变强、打得更好、突破更难的内容
options.text_en: Improving my skill and overcoming harder content

options.text_zh: 想尝试新的构筑、套路和玩法组合
options.text_en: Trying new builds, synergies, and playstyles

options.text_zh: 想不断优化系统、资源和长期发展
options.text_en: Optimizing systems, resources, and long-term growth

title_zh: 下面哪类内容最容易劝退你？
title_en: Which type of content is most likely to push you away from a game?

options.text_zh: 太多战斗、操作和持续高压
options.text_en: Too much combat, execution pressure, and constant intensity

options.text_zh: 太多复杂系统、经营和资源管理
options.text_en: Too many complex systems, management layers, and resource juggling

options.text_zh: 太多恐怖、压迫和不安感
options.text_en: Too much horror, pressure, and emotional stress

options.text_zh: 太依赖社交、组队或玩家对抗
options.text_en: Too much dependence on social play, teamwork, or PvP
